visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a stack of three display boxes for 'Tokyo Kaiju Universe' toys. The boxes feature a brown cat-like monster character. (2) A physical toy of a brown four-legged creature with a cat's head and a thick tail is shown from several angles. (3) A different toy, a gray fish with four limbs and a red rocket on its back, is presented on a clear stand. (4) An adult female and a young boy with glasses are seen in a brightly lit indoor living room, looking excitedly at something off-camera. (5) The camera zooms in on the back of a toy box as a hand points to a green monster illustration. A 3D CGI model of the green monster briefly appears over the box. (6) The woman points at different monster illustrations on the box including a panda-like kaiju. (7) Three people are gathered around a wooden coffee table with several toy boxes. They are discussing and gesturing towards the boxes. (8) A CGI panda monster with a wide, toothy grin appears on the screen alongside its name. (9) The woman begins tearing open the top of one of the toy boxes. (10) The fish-rocket toy is revealed inside its plastic packaging on the table. (11) The boy holds up a package while shouting, and a large red variety-style text '突發' (Unexpected) appears over the screen. (12) The group continues unboxing and reacting with laughter and gestures. The woman holds up two identical toys in plastic bags. (13) The video ends with a shot of the woman holding up a toy to the camera, followed by a final CGI shot of the green monster on a black background.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: 東京怪獸ユニバース TOKYO KAIJU UNIVERSE. (2) [Subtitle]: 我很想要這一隻. [Slogan]: 宇宙怪獸 改造ガマゴラー. (3) [Subtitle]: 你們可以幫我開嗎. (4) [Subtitle]: 我想要這一隻. (5) [Subtitle]: 還有這一隻這一隻. [Variety]: (家庭會議中...). (6) [Subtitle]: 然後跟這一隻這一隻. (7) [Subtitle]: 你想要哪一隻. (8) [Subtitle]: 我想要這一隻. (9) [Subtitle]: 好. (10) [Subtitle]: 你們可以幫我嗎. (11) [Subtitle]: 我開一隻 你們一人開兩隻. (12) [Subtitle]: 好. (13) [Subtitle]: 我開這隻. (14) [Subtitle]: 如果抽到兩個這隻 一隻給你. (15) [Subtitle]: 好 我也想要熊貓. [Slogan]: 電腦怪獸 パンダム. (16) [Subtitle]: 好 那我先開囉. (17) [Subtitle]: 我們開始囉. [Variety]: (賴迴). [Slogan]: 宇宙怪獸 マグローリー. (18) [Variety]: 突發. [Subtitle]: 媽媽!. (19) [Subtitle]: 謝謝你. [Variety]: (是我想用的!). (20) [Subtitle]: 哇 你兩隻一樣的. (21) [Subtitle]: 真的運氣不好. (22) [Subtitle]: 你說我是臭手. (23) [Variety]: (自我安慰的波). [Subtitle]: 這個也沒關係. (24) [Subtitle]: 結果熊貓都沒得到.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 adult female, 1 boy with glasses, and 1 younger boy partially visible from behind.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: The main female character is wearing a blue and white striped long-sleeved shirt with dark hair. The young boy is wearing a light green sweater and black-framed glasses.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A modern indoor living room with a beige sofa, a light-colored wooden coffee table, a TV remote, and a large window in the background showing an urban view with green hills.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, cheerful marimba and piano BGM begins playing. Low-level room tone is present. (2) A sudden, loud, high-pitched scream of excitement from a child echoes. (3) A female adult voice speaks with high energy and positive valence, followed by conversational banter between her and two children. (4) Distinct sound effects of cardboard being torn and thin plastic bags rustling are heard as boxes are opened. (5) Another loud vocal exclamation from a child ('Mama!') followed by melodic laughter from the group. (6) The voices continue to talk excitedly, overlapping with the persistent bright BGM until the end of the track.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Introduction -> Expectation Setting -> Action (Unboxing) -> Resolution (Results).
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To document and share the fun and surprise of a family unboxing 'Tokyo Kaiju Universe' blind boxes, highlighting the interactive experience between a mother and her children.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses typical social media editing styles including large variety-show text overlays and CGI toy inserts to enhance the unboxing excitement. The high audio arousal from the children contributes significantly to the energetic feel.
